{{CargoRelic
|name=Dinner Credit Card
|class_id=20523
|rank=Blue
|affct=CIV
|source=
|description=Dinner Credit Card was the first plastic charge card, which eventually became an international credit card. As the oldest credit card in the world, it features a classic cover which makes it a possible collectible. In many regions, joining the Dinner Club was a status symbol.
|fame=27
|art=36
|fth=19
|civ=48
|tech=28
|ss1=W-tads gained from VIP Gem Card +50<br>Travel Speedups gained from VIP Gem Card +30m
|ss2=W-tads gained from VIP Gem Card +50<br>Travel Speedups gained from VIP Gem Card +30m
|ss3=W-tads gained from VIP Gem Card +50<br>Travel Speedups gained from VIP Gem Card +30m
|ss4=W-tads gained from VIP Gem Card +50<br>Travel Speedups gained from VIP Gem Card +30m
|ss7=W-tads gained from VIP Gem Card +50<br>Travel Speedups gained from VIP Gem Card +30m<br>W-tads gained from VIP Gem Card +50 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Compass skill I.png|50px]]Place in Exploration Compass: In explorations, INTEL gained +2.5%
}}
